Chrome Extension

Remote Job Search Starter

Search supported job boards, open a limited number of job pages, and autofill applications with the matching resume when a form is found.

Detected site Checking...

Status

Open Indeed, ZipRecruiter, Dice, or Monster to begin.

Settings are stored locally in the extension.

Automation

Choose how many jobs each search should open and whether resumes should upload automatically.

Candidate Profile

These values are used for blank fields on Indeed, ZipRecruiter, Monster, and company career pages.

Resume Files

Each search uses its matching resume when a resume or CV upload is available.

Remembered Answers

When you manually answer application questions, the extension stores the question and reuses the answer on matching forms later.

Saved answers 0

If the site asks you to verify that you are human, finish it manually and the extension will resume. The extension fills fields and uploads files, but it does not auto-submit applications.
